title: January 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 11''' is the 11th day of the year. There are 354 days remaining (355 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Felix Silla]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Adi Granov]] is born.
*[[1982]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] starts.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 30|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 30]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 134|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 134]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Republic 82|''Republic'' 82]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 2|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 2]] published.
*2012 – [[Knights of the Old Republic: War 1|''Knights of the Old Republic: War'' 1]] published.
*2012 – [[Star Wars: Legacy — War (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Legacy — War '' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 10|''Poe Dameron'' 10]] published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Mandalorian's Quest]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Path of the Force]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Tribute to Star Wars]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Yoda One for Me]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunters Vol. 3 — War of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi (English TPB)|''Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Artifacts]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Solitary Clone]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 30|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 30]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 4|''The High Republic'' (2022) 4]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 2|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 2]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian 7|''The Mandalorian'' 7]] published.
<noinclude>
